content.text:
All 7 files are in place. Here's a summary of what was created:

### `extensions/pulseboard/` — PulseBoard Channel Plugin

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package metadata (`@openclaw/pulseboard`, `type: "module"`) with the `openclaw` block defining extension entry, setup entry, and channel metadata (id, label, selectionLabel, docsPath, blurb) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest with `id: "pulseboard"`, `channels: ["pulseboard"]`, and a minimal `configSchema` |
| `src/types.ts` | Three interfaces: `PulseBoardAccount` (boardUrl, apiToken, username), `PulseBoardConfig` (accounts record), `PulseBoardMessage` (id, boardId, authorId, content, timestamp) |
| `src/runtime.ts` | Runtime store via `createPluginRuntimeStore` — exports `getPulseBoardRuntime` and `setPulseBoardRuntime` with error message `"PulseBoard runtime not initialized"` |
| `src/channel.ts` | Channel plugin built with `createChatChannelPlugin` — id `"pulseboard"`, meta via `getChatChannelMeta()`, capabilities (direct+group, no media), config/setup/gateway/messaging/outbound adapters with stubs, `normalizeTarget` trims whitespace, outbound `deliveryMode: "direct"` with `textChunkLimit: 4000` |
| `index.ts` | Entry point using `defineChannelPluginEntry()` with id, name, description, plugin, and setRuntime |
| `setup-entry.ts` | Setup entry via `defineSetupPluginEntry(pulseBoardPlugin)` |

The plugin follows the same structural patterns as the existing IRC and Nostr channel plugins, using the same SDK imports (`openclaw/plugin-sdk/core`, `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime-store`, `openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-send-result`) and conventions (`.js` extensions in imports, ESM module type, workspace dev dependency on `openclaw`).

result:
All 7 files are in place. Here's a summary of what was created:

### `extensions/pulseboard/` — PulseBoard Channel Plugin

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package metadata (`@openclaw/pulseboard`, `type: "module"`) with the `openclaw` block defining extension entry, setup entry, and channel metadata (id, label, selectionLabel, docsPath, blurb) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest with `id: "pulseboard"`, `channels: ["pulseboard"]`, and a minimal `configSchema` |
| `src/types.ts` | Three interfaces: `PulseBoardAccount` (boardUrl, apiToken, username), `PulseBoardConfig` (accounts record), `PulseBoardMessage` (id, boardId, authorId, content, timestamp) |
| `src/runtime.ts` | Runtime store via `createPluginRuntimeStore` — exports `getPulseBoardRuntime` and `setPulseBoardRuntime` with error message `"PulseBoard runtime not initialized"` |
| `src/channel.ts` | Channel plugin built with `createChatChannelPlugin` — id `"pulseboard"`, meta via `getChatChannelMeta()`, capabilities (direct+group, no media), config/setup/gateway/messaging/outbound adapters with stubs, `normalizeTarget` trims whitespace, outbound `deliveryMode: "direct"` with `textChunkLimit: 4000` |
| `index.ts` | Entry point using `defineChannelPluginEntry()` with id, name, description, plugin, and setRuntime |
| `setup-entry.ts` | Setup entry via `defineSetupPluginEntry(pulseBoardPlugin)` |

The plugin follows the same structural patterns as the existing IRC and Nostr channel plugins, using the same SDK imports (`openclaw/plugin-sdk/core`, `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime-store`, `openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-send-result`) and conventions (`.js` extensions in imports, ESM module type, workspace dev dependency on `openclaw`).
